title: The Fallacy of the Unmediated World
description: Why the modern revolt against technology's mediation is built on a question-begging fallacy, and how to praise tools as participation in the Logos.

title: Little Worlds and Large Language Models
description: The deeper frame for the site: small bounded forms, large orders, scale, language models, and the Logos.

title: Not Magic, But Math
category: The Beauty of the Language Machine
description: A first orientation to LLMs as human mathematical artifacts rather than occult or alien minds.

title: From the Book of Nature to the Book of Language
category: The Beauty of the Language Machine
description: If mathematics makes the natural world legible, LLMs suggest that language is mathematically legible too.

title: A Language Model Is a Probability Distribution
description: A plain-language account of next-token prediction, probability, and why statistical language is not spiritually shallow.
